project_settings.trajectory_heights: [6.4, 6.4] # Approx. height of bridge trajectory above starting point, quadratic approx.

text_edits.project_text_edit:
Project Information

bridge_name = 2023-11_Bierstalbrug # Input data should have {bridge_name} and be in import_dir

import_dir = C:\Code\_Orbitv1.2.0\01_ImportFolder

project_dir_base = C:\Code\_Orbitv1.2.0\02_FlightRoutes # base for the project output


Trajectory (If no import data available):

trajectory_heights = [6.4, 6.4] # Approx. height of bridge trajectory above starting point, quadratic approx.

ground_elevation = 0 # Purely cosmetic. Defines pillar base altitude.


Coordinate system:

coordinate_system = Lambert72 # Lambert72, or any EPSG code

heightStartingPoint_Ellipsoid = 0

heightStartingPoint_Reference = 0


Cross-section:

input_scale_meters = 18.36 # Mark one distance in green. bridge_width is the largest distance across.

epsilonInput = 0.003 # Smaller value is tighter fit

Imported data:

trajectory_points_count = 5

pillars_count = 4

trajectory_length = 131.36

average_pillar_height = 7.94

epsg_code = 31370
text_edits.flight_routes_text_edit:
Overview Flight:

order = ["201", "r201","202", "r202","203", "r203"] # 1=right side, r=reverse. useing offsets as in standard_flight_routes (below)

transition_mode = 2 # 0 = separate right and left side, 1=pass middle, 2=after last segment

transition_vertical_offset = 0 # Or underneath e.g. -6

transition_horizontal_offset = 0


Safety Zones:

safety_zones_clearance = [[0,32],[0,32],[0,25]] #min, max local. default 0,35 m
safety_zones_clearance_adjust = [[32],[32],[25]]

# adjust points inside zones. 0 = delete points, -1 find closest exit


Underdeck Flights:

num_points = [3, 7, 3] # Base points per section

horizontal_offsets_underdeck = [8, 8, 8]# H_Offest of base points

height_offsets_underdeck = [[5, 5, 5], [5.5,4.5,4.25,4,4.25,4.5, 5.5], [5, 5, 5]] # Vertical offset below trajectory (consider slab) using quadratic approx per base point.

general_height_offset = 3

thresholds_zones = [(10, 10), (8, 8), (10, 10)] # Threshold distance

custom_zone_angles = [0.26, 0.08, 0.08] # [2.16, 2.20, 2.24] # Adjust angle

connection_height = 25 # vertical flight height for connections

num_passes = 2 # num passes underdeck flighs

num_passes_middle = 4


Export Modus:

heightMode = EGM96 #relativeToStartPoint or EGM96

heightStartingPoint_Ellipsoid = 51.194# Typically 50.2 m in Belgium. Place drone on ground and read EXIF from image / RTK settings

heightStartingPoint_Reference= 7.988 # Typically 8.0 m. Height in geolocated point cloud

# Z waypoint= bridge trajectory (e.g. trajectory_heights) + offsets + heightStartingPoint_Ellipsoid - heightStartingPoint_Reference


Additional Features:

safety_check_photo = 1

safety_check_underdeck = [[0],[0],[0]] # 1 = execute safety check.

safety_check_underdeck_axial = [[0],[0],[0]] # 1 = execute safety check.

n_girders = 3

underdeck_split = 1

underdeck_axial = 0

droneEnumValue = 77 # M3E = 77

payloadEnumValue = 66 # M3E = 66

globalWaypointTurnMode = toPointAndStopWithDiscontinuityCurvature # coordinateTurn, toPointAndStopWithContinuityCurvature, toPointAndPassWithContinuityCurvature toPointAndStopWithDiscontinuityCurvature


standard_flight_routes = {

"101": {"vertical_offset": 12, "distance_offset": 12},

"102": {"vertical_offset": 8, "distance_offset": 8},

"103": {"vertical_offset": -6, "distance_offset": 7},

"201": {"vertical_offset": 12, "distance_offset": 12},

"202": {"vertical_offset": 8, "distance_offset": 8},

"203": {"vertical_offset": -6, "distance_offset": 7}}


flight_speed_map = {

"101": {"speed": "5"},"102": {"speed": "4"},

"201": {"speed": "5"},"202": {"speed": "4"},

"103": {"speed": "2"},"203": {"speed": "2"},

"104": {"speed": "3"},"105": {"speed": "2"},

"204": {"speed": "3"},"205": {"speed": "2"},

"transition": {"speed": "5"},
"underdeck_span1": {"speed": "0.8"},

"underdeck_span2": {"speed": "0.85"},

"underdeck_span3": {"speed": "0.8"},

"connection": {"speed": "2.5"},

"axial_span1": {"speed": "1.0"},

"axial_span2": {"speed": "1.0"},

"axial_span3": {"speed": "1.0"}

}}
